title: Skill Eval Config
description: Schema for skills/<name>/evals/evals.json — the input to scripts/eval/run_eval.py.

skill_name.description: Must match the skill's frontmatter name and the skills/<name>/ directory.

evals.description: Eval cases — each one is one claude -p invocation.

id.description: Unique integer id within this file.

name.description: Slug used as the case directory name. Defaults to `eval-<id>`.

prompt.description: User-facing task prompt passed to claude as the positional arg.

system_prompt.description: Optional override for the system prompt. When omitted the runner injects a default that points at SKILL.md.

json_schema.description: JSON Schema passed to `claude --json-schema`. Constrains the structured output the agent must produce. Validated as a real JSON Schema (Draft 2020-12).

assertions.description: Mechanical checks against the structured response. Empty is allowed but useless.

name.description: Human-readable label shown in benchmark output.

path.description: Dotted path into the structured response. Integer segments index into lists. Empty string targets the root.

value.description: Comparison value. Required for all ops except `truthy`/`falsy`. For `matches`/`not_matches` it is a Python regex string. For `length_gte`/`length_lte` it must be an integer.
